name: Gourmet's Chicken Divan
recipeIngredient: 1 large broccoli head, cut into 4-inch spears
1/4 cup unsalted butter, cut into pieces
2 chicken breasts, skinned and boneless, cooked and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan of boiling, salted water, cook the broccoli for 6-8 minutes or until it is just tender. Drain it well and keep warm.
2. In a heavy saucepan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Add flour and cook roux, stirring, for 3 minutes.
3. Gradually add the broth, stirring, and bring the mixture to a simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking the mixture, stirring, for another 10 minutes.
5. In a bowl, beat the cream until it holds stiff peaks.
6. Fold the cream, sherry, and lemon juice into the sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Arrange broccoli on a flameproof plate or a 2-quart gratin dish. Pour half the sauce over the broccoli.
8. Stir in 1/4 cup Parmesan into the remaining sauce.
9. Arrange the chicken on top of the broccoli, pour the remaining sauce over it, and sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese.
10. Broil under a preheated broiler about 6 inches from the flame for 1 minute or until the sauce is golden and bubbling.
